narrative:
North Royalton-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 988 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
